title: Charlotte
description:
Yuu Otosaka is a high school student who possesses the mysterious ability to temporarily take control of another person’s body for a few seconds. He secretly uses this power to make his life easier until he is discovered by Nao Tomori, a girl with supernatural abilities who forces him to transfer to a special school for students like them. Together with other ability users, Yuu begins helping the student council track down teenagers who misuse their powers.

Although their abilities seem harmless at first, Yuu slowly learns the painful truth behind these supernatural powers and the suffering connected to them. As friendships deepen and tragic events begin changing his life, Yuu is forced to confront loss, responsibility, and the true purpose of his abilities. Blending comedy, romance, drama, and emotional storytelling, Charlotte becomes a heartfelt story about youth, sacrifice, and protecting the people you care about.
